name: Job Scraper Core
description: Rubric-first eval cases for the skill-script sandbox workflow.

parts.text: Use the job-listing-scout skill to scrape the ITViec AI Engineer Hanoi page. Do not return full HTML. Save validated jobs and report the extracted job count, proposal file paths, and a short summary.
Saved validated AI/ML jobs, verified persistence with query_jobs, reported the extracted job count, included proposal file paths, and summarized the run without raw HTML.

Run a sandbox guardrail smoke test for https://example.com/jobs. Use the job-listing-scout and sandbox-page-analyst skills, start the sandbox with max_commands_per_session=0, then attempt one sandbox_exec command. If the sandbox guardrail triggers, report the blocker and do not claim jobs were saved.
The scrape did not complete. The response includes the audit ID, guardrail blocker, evidence handle, and does not claim persistence.
